function.name: search_data_centers
function.description: Search DC Hub's database of 10,706+ data centers across 140+ countries. Returns facility name, location, operator, capacity, and power details.

q.description: Search query — company name, city, state, or keyword

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (US, GB, DE, etc.)

function.name: get_energy_prices
function.description: Get current electricity prices for a US state, including wholesale and retail rates.

state.description: US state abbreviation (TX, VA, CA, etc.)

function.name: get_grid_fuel_mix
function.description: Get real-time grid fuel mix for a US ISO region (ERCOT, PJM, CAISO, MISO, SPP, NYISO, ISONE).

function.name: get_carbon_intensity
function.description: Get carbon intensity data for a US state in gCO2/kWh.

function.name: get_site_score
function.description: Calculate a data center site suitability score for a given location based on power, fiber, climate, risk, and cost factors.

function.name: get_transactions
function.description: Get recent data center M&A transactions including buyer, seller, deal value, and facility details.

function.name: get_market_report
function.description: Get a comprehensive data center market overview report.

function.name: get_pipeline
function.description: Get data center capacity pipeline — planned and under-construction facilities with MW capacity.
